title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Tulshi, convinced of the presence of an evil entity in the house, calls home a renowned Gurudev. Even without performing the rituals, the Gurudev straightaway feels an evil vibe coming out of Nishi's room. Is Nishi going to be exposed?

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.
